message:
🌱 Add vllm: [Feature]: Support Python 3.13 mission (#851)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vllm-12083-feature-support-python-3-13",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vllm: Support Python 3.13",
+    "description": "Add Python 3.13 support to vLLM. Python 3.13 was released on October 7, 2024, and most ML-related packages have added support. Users had to downgrade Python just for vLLM. Requested by 27+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check your Python version",
+        "description": "Verify your Python and vLLM versions:\n```bash\npython --version\npip show vllm | grep Version\n```\nPython 3.13 support requires an updated version of vLLM and its dependencies."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Set up a Python 3.13 environment",
+        "description": "Create a virtual environment with Python 3.13:\n```bash\n# Using uv (recommended)\nuv venv --python 3.13 ~/venvs/py313\nsource ~/venvs/py313/bin/activate\n\n# Or using standard venv\npython3.13 -m venv ~/venvs/py313\nsource ~/venvs/py313/bin/activate\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Install vLLM on Python 3.13",
+        "description": "Install vLLM in the Python 3.13 environment:\n```bash\n# Using precompiled wheels (faster)\nVLLM_USE_PRECOMPILED=1 pip install vllm\n\n# Or using uv with CUDA 12.8 backend\nVLLM_USE_PRECOMPILED=1 uv pip install -U vllm --torch-backend=cu128\n```\nThe precompiled option avoids building from source, which can be slow."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify vLLM works on Python 3.13",
+        "description": "Test that vLLM runs correctly:\n```bash\npython -c \"import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)\"\n\n# Start a test server\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B\n```\nYou should see the server start successfully without any Python 3.13 compatibility errors."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "vLLM added Python 3.13 support by updating dependencies and build configurations to be compatible with Python 3.13. Users can now install and run vLLM on Python 3.13 without needing to downgrade their Python version.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Set up Python 3.13 environment and install vLLM\nuv venv --python 3.13 ~/venvs/py313\nsource ~/venvs/py313/bin/activate\nVLLM_USE_PRECOMPILED=1 uv pip install -U vllm --torch-backend=cu128",
+        "# Verify it works\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --model Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vllm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature",
+      "python",
+      "compatibility"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "vllm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/12083",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/13164"
+    },
+    "reactions": 27,
+    "comments": 6,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "python",
+      "pip"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.13+, pip (or uv), a CUDA-capable GPU, and CUDA toolkit 12.x."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:45:36.941Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
